highlights.text: Bear case discussed above.” We made got to 6902 by the close.
Institutions are always positioning in advance, and my edge is to recognize the pattern which prints on the chart when they do so: My core setup - the Failed Breakdown.
As I frequently discuss all major rallies in ES start on Failed Breakdowns, because Failed Breakdowns are how institutions accumulate .

We saw it Monday March 30th as stated and this was a major accumulation event as institutions prepped for what ended up being a 480 point leg up - as always, we followed them : ES plunged to 6353 Monday March 30th in evening going elevator down .
An alternative is to wait for it to flush and recover (perhaps to 6353) for a Failed Breakdown.” From there, we were off to the races, getting to ~6662 by April 1st.
After a big rally like this, bulls had to rest, and (as always) buy the next dip via a Failed Breakdown.
A flush and recovery of this low is a clear Failed Breakdown and a powerful one.” ES flushed to 6760’s last evening, recovered 6780 shortly after (Failed Breakdown) and ripped to 6880’s today.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow
Targets would be 6677, 6691, 6716, then 6742” By the close Tuesday, we hit 6663 range resistance, and broke out viciously to 6880s on Friday.

post_title: Is Buy The Dip Back In SPX? April 14 Plan
